claims.text: Reinforcement learning has achieved remarkable success in a wide range of control and decision-making tasks.
claims.source_quote: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved remarkable success in a wide range of control and decision-making tasks.

claims.text: RL agents often exhibit unstable or degraded performance when deployed in environments subject to unexpected external disturbances and model uncertainties.
claims.source_quote: However, RL agents often exhibit unstable or degraded performance when deployed in environments subject to unexpected external disturbances and model uncertainties.

claims.text: The training process in MMDDPG is formulated as a minimax optimization problem between a user policy and an adversarial disturbance policy.
claims.source_quote: The training process is formulated as a minimax optimization problem between a user policy and an adversarial disturbance policy.

claims.text: In the MMDDPG framework, the user learns a robust policy that minimizes the objective function.
claims.source_quote: In this problem, the user learns a robust policy that minimizes the objective function, while the adversary generates disturbances that maximize it.

claims.text: In the MMDDPG framework, the adversary generates disturbances that maximize the objective function.

claims.text: The fractional objective balances task performance and disturbance magnitude.
claims.source_quote: we introduce a fractional objective that balances task performance and disturbance magnitude.

claims.text: The fractional objective prevents excessively aggressive disturbances.
claims.source_quote: This objective prevents excessively aggressive disturbances and promotes robust learning.

claims.text: The fractional objective promotes robust learning.
claims.source_quote: This objective prevents excessively aggressive disturbances and promotes robust learning.

claims.text: Experimental evaluations were conducted in MuJoCo environments.
claims.source_quote: Experimental evaluations in MuJoCo environments demonstrate that the proposed MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against both external force perturbations and model parameter variations.

claims.text: MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against external force perturbations compared to baseline methods.

claims.text: MMDDPG achieves significantly improved robustness against model parameter variations compared to baseline methods.
